case_title: KATHERINE E LOH VS. FELIX EJECKAM

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $152.50 SERVED OCT-12-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EJECKAM, FELIX

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. 863610 - PLAINTIFF KATHERINE E. LOH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FELIX EJECKAM IS PRESENT. LYNDA OMIAH, PROPERTY MANAGER TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF WAIVES THE SERVICE REQUIREMENT ON DEFENDANTS CLAIM.COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOH, KATHERINE E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EJECKAM, FELIX $1,925.00 PRINCIPAL, $227.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,152.50, (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MARCH 8, 2021) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. 863610 - PLAINTIFF KATHERINE E. LOH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FELIX EJECKAM IS PRESENT. LYNDA OMIAH, PROPERTY MANAGER TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF WAIVES THE SERVICE REQUIREMENT ON DEFENDANTS CLAIM. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2021 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY LOH, KATHERINE E AS TO DEFENDANT EJECKAM, FELIX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-08-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (PLAINTIFF)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,312.00 FILED BY EJECKAM, FELIX AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LOH, KATHERINE E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT EJECKAM, FELIX IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LOH, KATHERINE E (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MARCH 8, 2021) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-08-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (DEFENDANT)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT EJECKAM, FELIX
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
